heading: Provisions of section 392 extended to additional lands
label: 392a Provisions of section 392 extended to additional lands
text: The provisions of are extended over and made applicable to the lands added to the park and included within the boundary established by .section 392 of this titlesection 391a of this title
notes: Haleakala̅ National ParkEstablishment of detached portion of Hawaii National Park lying on island of Maui as Haleakala̅ National Park, effective , see .July 1, 1961section 396b of this title
